title: Plugin manifest
description: The declarative contract every plugin ships (system-design.md ┬¦3). The Loader reads this BEFORE any plugin code runs, so discovery, load order, version compatibility, namespacing and security are enforced from it. Cross-field rules a JSON Schema cannot express (e.g. every permission/event/provided token must be prefixed with `id` ŌĆö ┬¦6) are validated by the Loader at boot; this schema enforces the structural shape.

id.description: Globally unique id ŌĆö also the MANDATORY namespace prefix for every registered key (┬¦6).

coreVersion.description: Semver RANGE of the Core this plugin is compatible with (┬¦4); the Loader refuses to load a plugin whose range excludes the running Core.

kind.description: Plugin kind (┬¦3.1). `capability` = in-process module, same language as Core, talks via DI + Event Bus (the default). `tool` = an out-of-process backing service/datastore (Postgres, Redis, object store, a bot gateway) that ships its own container via `compose` and exposes only a namespaced connection contract. `app` = an out-of-process feature that owns its container AND its database and reaches Core only over HTTP + events ŌĆö may be written in any language. A `tool`/`app` sits behind the network seam, so it MAY be polyglot; a `capability` MUST NOT.

dependencies.description: Plugin ids that MUST boot first (┬¦4). The Loader topologically sorts on these; a cycle is a hard boot failure.

optionalDependencies.description: Used if present, degraded-but-functional if absent.

provides.description: Namespaced DI tokens this plugin registers into the container (e.g. `inventory.StockService`).

consumes.description: Namespaced contracts this plugin resolves via DI. Every entry must be `provide`d by Core or by a declared dependency (Loader-checked).

permissions.description: Permission keys ŌĆö all prefixed with `id` (┬¦6), e.g. `crm.lead.edit`.

routes.description: Route prefixes this plugin owns ŌĆö namespaced by id, e.g. `/crm/*`.

events.description: Event names this plugin emits / listens to (Event Bus, ┬¦5).

schema.description: Path to this plugin's config JSON Schema.

migrations.description: Path to this plugin's migrations; run in dependency order (┬¦4).

compose.description: Path to a Docker Compose fragment this plugin contributes ŌĆö required for `kind: tool`/`app`, which ship their own sidecar container(s). The App merges every enabled plugin's fragment into the generated stack; disable the plugin and its service disappears (┬¦3.1).

secrets.description: Names of the secret/config keys this plugin needs (e.g. `database_url`) ŌĆö resolved from the environment/secret store at boot, never hardcoded. Lets the App validate that every required secret is present before it starts a `tool`/`app` sidecar.
